input.command: for s in admin-user-password app-user-password readonly-user-password; do echo "=== $s ==="; kubectl get secret $s -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data}' 2>&1; echo; done

cd /tmp
ADMIN=$(kubectl get secret admin-user-password -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
echo "admin pw len: ${#ADMIN}"
# Check replica set status and existing users
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u admin -p "$ADMIN" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'rs.status().members.map(m=>({n:m.name,s:m.stateStr}))' 2>&1 | head -20

kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u admin -p "$ADMIN" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'print("OK myState="+rs.status().myState)' 2>&1 | tail -1
sleep 5
done
